title: Match URL paths against route templates
spec: The first input line is an integer N. The next N lines are route templates. Remaining lines are request paths. A template and path match when they have the same number of slash-separated segments and every literal template segment equals the corresponding path segment. Template segments wrapped in braces, such as `{id}`, are parameters and match any non-empty segment. For each request path, output the first matching template's extracted parameters as compact JSON with keys in template order. If the matching template has no parameters, output `{}`. If no template matches, output `NO MATCH`. Do not URL-decode.
